name: HWR_MNTR_PLAN_GOAL_TASKS_VL
query: SELECT B.TASK_ID, B.TARGET_COMPLETION_DATE, B.GOAL_ID, B.STATUS, B.PERSON_ID, B.TASKS_ATTR_1, B.TASKS_ATTR_2, T.TASK_NAME, T.DESCRIPTION, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_MNTR_PLAN_GOAL_TASKS_B B, HWR_MNTR_PLAN_GOAL_TASKS_TL T WHERE B.TASK_ID = T.TASK_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
